content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty opened -1.0%, Bank Nifty -1.2%, India VIX +5.6% to 17.79 — clear risk-off open driven by geopolitical (US-Iran/India-Pak) and crude tension. However, IT showing relative strength (-0.07%) as INR-hedge defensive, and several held positions (PNBHOUSING +3.8%, COFORGE +6.4%, DABUR +3.8%, POLYCAB +0.9%) gapping up. Priority today: trail SLs on winners, no new admits into a VIX-spiking session — 15 positions already on book with deployment at 65%.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1058.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+9.5% gain, CMP 1077.20. Current SL 1073.10 is only 0.4% below CMP — violates 1% trail-gap discipline (Rule guidance — would self-stopout on normal noise). Loosening SL slightly to 1058 (1.8% below CMP) which is still ABOVE entry 984 (locks in ~+7.5% gain). This is a TIGHTENING relative to original entry SL and a widening of self-stopout gap — preserves recovery option while protecting most of the gain. Target unchanged at 1135 (~+5.4% upside from CMP, R:R favorable on remaining move). Note: I'm raising it above original entry SL but BELOW current stored SL — guardrail may reject; if so, will hold at 1073."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+8.9% gain on Q4 beat + IT defensive rotation. CMP 1371.40, current SL 1352 is 1.4% below CMP (within the 1% gap floor, marginal). Holding SL at 1352 was already a tighten from entry; trying 1340 — wait, that LOOSENS. Correcting: HOLD current SL 1352. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "reasoning": "Correction to prior entry: keeping COFORGE SL at 1352 (1.4% gap below CMP 1371.40, within trail-gap discipline). Q4 PAT had one-time tax benefit but order book +16% YoY and FY27 margin guidance >20.5% supports continued upside to 1420 target. R:R from here: 19 risk vs 49 reward = 2.6x — favorable."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 818.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+1.0%, CMP 828.20. Current SL 820 = entry — guardrail issue: SL = entry was placed at entry, so any tightening only goes UP. Moving to 818 LOOSENS — rejected. Switching to HOLD: SL at 820 (entry) provides breakeven floor, target 855 still valid post-Q4 22% revenue growth and FMCG rotation."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "reasoning": "-0.9% but gold ETF as portfolio hedge during VIX spike +5.6% and geopolitical risk. SL 121 (3% below CMP) appropriate for low-vol ETF. Hold thesis: safe-haven flow on US-Iran tensions, weak rupee."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "-0.9%, CMP 2996.20 hovering near SL 3000 (SL is technically 0.1% ABOVE CMP — but stored SL was set BEFORE today's open; CMP just opened. Defense thesis intact: FY26 PAT +41.8% YoY, Rs 17K cr order book, corvette L1 Rs 33K cr pending. Rule 17: do NOT panic-exit on proximity-to-SL; SL was sized for this thesis. If 3000 hits, exit per plan. Keep recovery optionality on intact thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+2.5%, CMP 826.15. SL already at 820 (1.7% below entry 806 — wait, 820 is ABOVE entry 806, so SL is already locking +1.7% gain). No-op MODIFY. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "Correction: SL 820 is already above entry 806, locks +1.7% gain. CMP 826.15 only 0.7% above SL — but trail-gap >1% would require SL below 818, which LOOSENS — not allowed. Hold. Q4 record revenue + 3 analyst meets in May + Rs 4 dividend record date July 10 support continued upside to 875."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "-2.3%, CMP 1455.30 vs SL 1465 — SL is ABOVE CMP. Hmm: stored SL 1465 > CMP 1455.30 means position should already be stopped. Likely SL stored is the trigger and pending engine processing, or data lag. Q4 PAT +37.2% YoY, EBITDA margin 23.2% — fundamentals strong. If SL hits, accept the -2% stop per plan."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "reasoning": "+0.1%, CMP 1619.10. SL 1580 (2.4% below). Research flags neutral with -0.05 modifier post weak Q4 print and 3.84% same-day decline on heavy volume. Holding to SL — not panic-exiting on intact-SL position. If SL hits, that's the calibrated max loss."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "-0.6%, CMP 2769.10 vs SL 2755 (0.5% below). Q4 PAT +47% FY26, Rs 2,300 cr capex on refrigerants, China+1 tailwind. Thesis intact, SL will absorb noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "-0.7%, CMP 9039.50 vs SL 9020 (0.2% below — within absorb band). Q4 record revenue Rs 8,860 Cr, market share 30-31%, Rs 47 dividend, Citi target Rs 10,500. Strong thesis. If 9020 fires, accept stop. Pre-market showed +0.89% so volatility expected."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "-2.1%, CMP 1973 vs SL 1955 (0.9% below). Q4 standalone EBITDA margin 27%, defense order book Rs 10,961 cr, FY27 guidance +25%. Auto sector weak today (-2%) explaining drawdown. Thesis intact for defense + N.A. truck cycle."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "-2.3%, CMP 356 vs SL 354 (0.6% below — tight). Q4 PAT +30.6% YoY, Macquarie target 415. BFSI sector weak today (Bank Nifty -1.2%) pulling NBFC down. Thesis intact; let SL fire if hit, do not preempt."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "-1.8%, CMP 10561.50 vs SL 10440 (1.2% below — within trail-gap floor). Q4 beat, Rs 5,633 Cr buyback at Rs 12,000, Rs 150 dividend. Auto sector -2% today is broad weakness, not BAJAJ-specific. Strong fundamentals support holding through chop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "reasoning": "-0.9%, CMP 482.40 vs SL 472 (2.2% below). Q4 PAT +16% YoY, raised FY27 guidance to low double-digit, Rs 5.50 dividend. FMCG rotation theme intact (DABUR pre-market +3.77%). Target 510 valid."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "reasoning": "+0.2%, CMP 1229 vs SL 1190 (3.2% below). Research neutral (-0.05): Kotak Sell Rs 800, P/E ~48x rich, Q4 pending in May — BINARY EVENT WITHIN 3 SESSIONS per Rule 11. Position is small (~2% of capital), under 5% threshold, so event-trade size acceptable. Hold to SL or Q4 print, whichever first."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1058.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up from 1073.10 — wait, 1058 < 1073.10, that LOOSENS. Correcting: keep SL at 1073.10 (or tighten further). Per the loosen-rejection rule, no MODIFY. Action: HOLD at 1073.10. Acknowledging this is tight at 0.4% below CMP — if it self-stopouts, that's still +9% locked gain, acceptable outcome."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1352 already locks ~+7.4% from entry. 1.4% trail gap to CMP is within discipline."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry 820, locks breakeven floor. Cannot loosen."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hold during VIX spike. SL 121 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defense thesis intact. SL 3000 = max calibrated loss; do not preempt."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 820 above entry, locks +1.7% gain."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Pre-market CMP showing rally to 1476; SL/CMP discrepancy likely data sync timing. Strong Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hold to SL 1580, accept calibrated loss if hit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 +47% FY26 PAT growth, thesis strong."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Strong fundamentals; hold to plan."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defense + auto component diversification; SL absorbs auto-sector weakness."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "BFSI weakness is sector-wide; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback at Rs 12,000 = ~14% premium support. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "FMCG rotation theme + Q4 beat."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 binary in May — event-trade sized."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "PENDING ORDER: HFCL MIS BUY 600 @ 133.50 has been OPEN for 7469 minutes (~5 days). This is a stale stale-stale pending order — it should NEVER have been MIS held overnight, and is non-sensical at this point. Need to CANCEL via separate channel. Marking as known stale. New admits considered but REJECTED today: (1) THERMAX/NUVAMA pre-market +10-12% gappers in a VIX-spike open are fade-risk, not chase candidates. (2) HCLTECH at 52w low oversold but in deep downtrend, no reversal confirmation. (3) FINCABLES/POLYCAB-add — already hold POLYCAB, cables cluster cap. (4) TITAN/APOLLOHOSP/BERGEPAINT — BERGEPAINT has results May 12 (binary in 1 session, Rule 11 disqualifies). (5) PERSISTENT/INFY — IT cluster already covered via COFORGE +HCLTECH-watch. (6) CRAFTSMAN 15x volume — exotic, no clear catalyst verification in time. Book is already 65% deployed with 15 positions — adding into VIX +5.6% open without a confirmed reversal would be theme-stacking. Will reassess in afternoon after 11:30 IST tape clarifies.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is heavily diversified across 15 names, deployment 65%, cash 35% — appropriate for VIX spike day. Key risk concentration: 5 names sitting within 1% of their SL (GRSE, PIDILITIND, BHARATFORG, ABCAPITAL, BAJAJ-AUTO) — if Nifty trades down toward 23800 support, several SLs may fire simultaneously, potentially a ~₹6-8K cumulative realized loss. That is acceptable and within risk budget — these are the calibrated maximum losses sized at entry. Rule 17 discipline: do NOT preempt these stops. Winners (PNBHOUSING +9.5%, COFORGE +8.9%, CAMS +2.5%) have SLs locking in gains. Net: structurally balanced; let the tape resolve. No new entries today unless an exceptional setup emerges post-11:30 IST."
}
